3064510.name: Relics: A Dark-Fantasy Deck-Survivor
3064510.description:
Relics is a dark fantasy deckbuilding survivor where you face overwhelming hordes in fast-paced real-time combat. Harness the power of your deck,casting spells, summoning demons, and triggering devastating combos on the fly. As chaos unfolds, uncover ancient Relics, game changing artifacts that reshape your strategy and evolve with your playstyle. Each run is a new journey through twisted realms, fire magic, and deadly encounters.

In Relics, you are a lone mage who has torn open the veil between worlds. Now, hunted by horrors beyond imagination, you must survive. Craft a unique deck of spells and skills, wield forbidden magic in real time, and adapt your tactics as enemies grow stronger with each passing minute. Collect cursed Relics, remnants of forgotten ages, that grant immense power and alter the rules of combat. Will you master the chaos, or be consumed by it?

A real-time roguelike where cards are your weapons.

Relics fuses dark fantasy, deckbuilding, and survivor action into one relentless experience.

Build your deck, slay endless hordes, and collect powerful relics that change the rules of each run.
3064510.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
